The '''101st Regiment''' was a [[Regiment/Legends|regiment]] of the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] under the [[Commander/Legends|command]] of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Danyawarra]]. The 101st was part of the [[7th Legion]], and consisted of well over 2,000 [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]]. During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Danyawarra accepted a position as [[Jedi Commander/Legends|Jedi Commander]], and took on the leadership of the 101st Regiment. One of its subordinate units was [[Hawkbat Battalion]],<ref name="GAR Guide" /> whose [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] fought in a muddied terrestrial object with the support of [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry/Legends|LAAT/i gunships]].<ref name="CW 1">{{CW|1}}</ref>
